name: Mix-Easy Ribbon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Have ingredients at room temperature.
2. Grease two 8-inch layer pans and line the bottoms with parchment paper.
3. Pour half of the batter into one layer pan.
4. To the remaining batter, add molasses, filling: Combine cornstarch, sugar, salt, raisins, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind in a bowl.
5. Add the filling to the first pan and pour the remaining batter into the second layer pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. To prepare the icing, cream the grated lemon rind with butter in a bowl.
8. Gradually add confectioner's sugar and salt, then mix in lemon juice and water until smooth.
9. Once the cakes have cooled slightly, spread the icing over one layer and sandwich it with the other layer.
